title: E1 hooks verified end-to-end
content: All five E1 hooks (token_budget_gate, token_budget_tracker, loop_detector, context_baseline, context_health_check) plus three adapters (session_start, pre_tool_use, post_tool_use) tested and verified. Budget gate blocks at 100%, tracker warns at 80% and escalates at 90%, context health detects missing sections and high utilization.
